items.title: feat(ui): add workboard keyboard movement controls
items.summary:
feat(ui): add workboard keyboard movement controls Add compact keyboard-accessible Workboard status movement controls for writable operators. The control reuses the existing workboard.cards.move path, preserves drag/drop as the pointer enhancement, and suppresses mutation controls for read-only operators.

Verification:
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/workboard.test.ts
- corepack pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 ui/src/ui/views/workboard.ts ui/src/ui/views/workboard.test.ts ui/src/styles/workboard.css docs/plugins/workboard.md
- git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
- Chromium Control UI mock Gateway keyboard movement proof
- .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main --no-web-search
